---
title: "Chapter 18: Using the Internet"
description: "Chapter-level study notes for Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation."
book_id: "handbook-practical-program-evaluation"
collection_id: "evaluation-texts"
note_type: "Chapter"
chapter_number: 18
source_pages: "516-538"
citation_key: "newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation"
evidence_ids:
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch18-chapter-18-using-the-internet:c0001"
  - "chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-2:c0001"
source_status: "needs_review"
---

# Chapter 18: Using the Internet

<div class="chapter-meta"><span>516-538</span><span>Part 2: Practical Data Collection Procedures</span><span>Source status: needs_review</span></div>

## Core Claim

Internet-based tools support literature review, online data collection, project communication, and evidence dissemination.

## Summary

The chapter discusses Internet use for literature searches, online polls or surveys, and project web sites.

It treats the Internet as a practical extension of evaluation data collection and communication rather than a separate method family.

The evaluator still has to assess search quality, source credibility, coverage, respondent access, and the fit between online tools and evaluation questions.

## Key Concepts

- **data collection plan**: The operational plan linking evaluation questions to information sources, instruments, fieldwork, and staffing.
- **survey**: Structured data collection from a population or sample.
- **evaluation synthesis**: Systematic combination of existing studies or findings to assess what is known.

## Practice Implications

- Use online tools only when coverage and quality fit the question.
- Document search and retrieval procedures.
- Pair Internet tools with other data sources when needed.

## Source Records

- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:ch18-chapter-18-using-the-internet:c0001`
- `chunk:handbook-practical-program-evaluation:part-2:c0001`

## References

These notes summarise source-linked records from *Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation* [@newcomer_hatry_wholey_2015_handbook_practical_program_evaluation].
